## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link the issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm test` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated (rule changes: a firing case and a non-firing case)
- [ ] New rules: next free `SXXX` ID, documented in `README.md` **and** `README.ja.md`
- [ ] No new network calls, LLM calls, or runtime dependencies
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` (user-visible changes)
